CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_name VARCHAR(100), event_date DATE, duration INTERVAL YEAR TO MONTH);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, 'New Year Celebration', '2023-01-01', INTERVAL '12' MONTH);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (2, 'Summer Festival', '2023-06-01', INTERVAL '6' MONTH);
SELECT event_name, event_date + duration AS end_date FROM events;
WITH duration_months AS (SELECT event_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM duration) * 12 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM duration) AS months FROM events) SELECT event_id, months FROM duration_months WHERE months > 12;
CREATE TABLE event_details (detail_id INT, event_id INT, detail_description TEXT);
INSERT INTO event_details VALUES (1, 1, 'Fireworks and drinks'), (2, 2, 'Concerts and food stalls');
SELECT e.event_name, ed.detail_description FROM events e JOIN event_details ed ON e.event_id = ed.event_id WHERE e.duration > INTERVAL '6' MONTH;
SELECT event_name, COUNT(detail_id) AS number_of_details FROM events e LEFT JOIN event_details ed ON e.event_id = ed.event_id GROUP BY e.event_name HAVING e.duration < INTERVAL '12' MONTH;
DELETE FROM events WHERE duration < INTERVAL '1' MONTH;
